name: GOLFTEC Fox Creek
address: 1501 Windy Hill Rd SE Unit B, Smyrna, GA 30080
about: GOLFTEC Fox Creek is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and practice. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback. It offers services such as private golf lessons, custom club fitting, and practice memberships, catering to golfers looking to improve their mechanics and performance in a structured, analytical environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Custom club fitting with shaft optimization and top brand partnerships
Structured practice sessions with coach-designed training plans
Professional PGA coaches providing personalized feedback
Access to high-tech training bays for real-time swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent clubs from GOLFTEC for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted. The facility does not offer on-site dining or alcohol service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies depending on the simulator software and usage, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes younger golfers with age-appropriate instruction and equipment.
